improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the price point and free searches creates urgency and transparency, while mentioning Claude signals AI credibility.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies exactly what it does (AI assistant for trade and business), building trust and clarity. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the low-friction free trial offer. 'No credit card required' reduces hesitation and increases trial conversions. Copy stays factual and aligned with the site context.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the primary conversion point where free users hit the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces friction and uncertainty at the critical decision moment, improving conversion from trial to paid membership.
